event: François I and Charles V visiting the Church of Saint-Denis
description: A tall vertical composition showing two richly dressed monarchs in the interior of a Gothic church. One wears white hose and a short cape, the other a longer dark garment. They stand before a group of clergy in ecclesiastical vestments. Red drapery hangs from a gallery above, where spectators look down. Courtiers and attendants in various dress fill the background. The church architecture features pointed arches and stained glass windows. The scene is formal and ceremonial.

_meta.title: François I and Charles V Visiting the Church of Saint Denis
